inputs.label: Parent Item Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Production order quantity for the parent item.

businessContext_i18n.en: Production order quantity for the parent item.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana ürün için üretim emri miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de l'ordre de fabrication pour l'article parent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de orden de producción para el artículo padre.

inputs.label: BOM Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Number of child items required per one parent item.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of child items required per one parent item.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ana ürün başına gereken alt ürün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der benötigten untergeordneten Artikel pro übergeordnetem Artikel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles enfants requis par article parent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de artículos hijos requeridos por cada artículo padre.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of child items scrapped during production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of child items scrapped during production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sırasında hurdaya çıkması beklenen alt ürünlerin yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Prozentsatz der untergeordneten Artikel, die während der Produktion ausgeschossen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu d'articles enfants mis au rebut pendant la production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de artículos hijos desechados durante la producción.

inputs.label: Safety Stock Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for safety stock to cover uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage for safety stock to cover uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri karşılamak için emniyet stoku olarak eklenen yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz für Sicherheitsbestand zur Abdeckung von Unsicherheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire pour le stock de sécurité afin de couvrir les incertitudes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional para stock de seguridad para cubrir incertidumbres.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
